name: mtb_h37rv_PE_PPE_PGRS_family_overview
description: PE/PPE/PGRS gene family — ~168 members (~10% of coding capacity) unique to Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex. PE family (~99 genes) and PPE family (~69 genes) named after their N-terminal Pro-Glu and Pro-Pro-Glu motifs. PE_PGRS subfamily (~65 genes) carries polymorphic GC-rich repetitive sequences as C-terminal extensions and is the dominant antigenic-variation reservoir. These genes are extraordinarily difficult to assemble and to map short reads to because of repetitive PGRS extensions and high paralog identity (>95% in many blocks). Require PSV disambiguation; many positions are reported as multi-mapping.
expected_copy_count: 168 (99 PE + 69 PPE; 65 of PE are PE_PGRS)
